Atty. DAVID J. STREZA of Vogl Meredith Burke, LLP, Tel No. (415) 398-0200 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court modified its tentative ruling as to sanctions, and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF LATRELLE GADDIES' Motion To Compel Verifications is denied. The substance of the Motion to Compel Verifications is moot. Sanctions in the amount of $600 are awarded against Safeway, payable within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/AJR)
